items.title: The 3 execs now in a 'horse race' to succeed Moynihan as BofA CEO
items.description: Bank of America has elevated three of CEO Brian Moynihan's lieutenants, clarifying who at the company has the best shot at running the nation’s second-largest lender once Moynihan steps down.
